summary: Matched several Dolphin SDK AR/AX objects using work from the dolsdk2001 repo. The PR removed assembly for dolphin/ar/ar.s, AXAlloc.s, AXAux.s, and AXProf.s, added C implementations and headers for AR/AX allocation, aux processing, profiling, and voice/parameter-block types, then switched the build configuration to compile the matched C objects. It also corrected symbol sizes for AX stack/aux globals and added OSPhysicalToUncached for ARAM size probing.
what_changed: Deleted large handwritten assembly stubs for AR and AX SDK modules: asm/dolphin/ar/ar.s, asm/dolphin/ax/AXAlloc.s, asm/dolphin/ax/AXAux.s, and asm/dolphin/ax/AXProf.s.
Added C definitions for AR globals in src/dolphin/ar/ar.c instead of only extern declarations: __AR_init_flag, __AR_BlockLength, __AR_FreeBlocks, __AR_StackPointer, __AR_Size, and __AR_Callback.

Implemented ARAM detection/support code in ar.c, including __ARWaitForDMA, __ARWriteDMA, __ARReadDMA, and __ARChecksize, with cache flush/invalidate calls and writes to the uncached OS physical location 0xD0.
Added DSP register index macros to src/dolphin/ar/ar.h, including DSP_ARAM_DMA_MM_HI/LO, DSP_ARAM_DMA_ARAM_HI/LO, DSP_ARAM_DMA_SIZE_HI/LO, DSP_ARAM_SIZE, DSP_ARAM_MODE, and DSP_DMA_START_FLAG.

Created src/dolphin/ax.h as a central AX SDK header containing AX parameter-block structs such as AXPBMIX, AXPBITD, AXPBUPDATE, AXPBDPOP, AXPBVE, AXPBFIR, AXPBADDR, AXPBADPCM, AXPBSRC, AXPBADPCMLOOP, AXPB, AXVPB, AXPBU, AXSPB, and AXPROFILE, along with AX constants and public/internal prototypes.

Implemented AX voice allocation stack logic in AXAlloc.c, including __AXGetStackHead, __AXServiceCallbackStack, __AXInitVoiceStacks, __AXAllocInit, __AXAllocQuit, free/callback/priority stack push-pop helpers, AXFreeVoice, AXAcquireVoice, and AXSetVoicePriority.

Implemented AX auxiliary callback/buffer logic in AXAux.c, including 32-byte-aligned Aux A/B buffers, callback/context globals, __AXAuxInit, __AXAuxQuit, aux input/output getters, __AXProcessAux, AXRegisterAuxACallback, and AXRegisterAuxBCallback.
Implemented AX profiling support in AXProf.c with __AXGetCurrentProfile, AXInitProfile, and AXGetProfile.
Expanded AXAlloc.h, AXAux.h, AXProf.h, and AXVPB.h with platform/AX includes and prototypes needed by the new matched C sources.
Updated configure.py and obj_files.mk so AXAlloc.c, AXAux.c, and AXProf.c are built as Matching objects instead of relying on asm equivalents.
Adjusted symbol map object sizes: __AXStackTail from 0x88 to 0x80, __AXCallbackStack from 0x8 to 0x4, and __AXAuxCpuReadWritePosition from 0x8 to 0x4.
smart_moves: Used SDK-derived structure definitions with explicit offset comments in ax.h, which makes AX parameter-block layout auditable and reusable for later AXVPB/AXCL/AXOut work.
Centralized AX constants, structs, public APIs, and cross-module externs in src/dolphin/ax.h, reducing ad hoc declarations across individual AX modules.
Converted build metadata and symbol sizes alongside the source changes, avoiding a partial match where C files compile but the linker/symbol map still reflects assembly-era assumptions.
Kept hardware-facing AR register writes readable by introducing DSP register index macros rather than leaving raw __DSPRegs numeric offsets everywhere.
Preserved matching-sensitive behavior in C for stack and callback list operations, including interrupt masking around voice allocation/freeing and priority changes.
Used cache management and 32-byte alignment in ARAM probing and AX aux buffers, matching the SDK/hardware constraints visible in the original assembly.
decomp_lessons: When replacing Dolphin SDK assembly with C, update all three layers together: source implementation, public/internal headers, and build object classification.
For SDK hardware code, naming register indices with macros can make C source understandable without changing the low-level bitmasking pattern needed for matching.
AX decomp depends heavily on exact struct layout. Offset-commented structs for parameter blocks and voice blocks are valuable matching infrastructure, not just documentation.
Small symbol size corrections in config/GALE01/symbols.txt can be necessary when C definitions reveal the true type/array shape of globals.
SDK reference work from external repos can accelerate matching, but the PR evidence only states use of dolsdk2001 generally; individual functions should still be validated against local diffs.

Callbacks and voice-stack manipulation should preserve interrupt discipline from assembly; AXAcquireVoice, AXFreeVoice, AXSetVoicePriority, and __AXServiceCallbackStack all retain OSDisableInterrupts/OSRestoreInterrupts regions.

ARAM/AX code often requires explicit cache flush/invalidate and aligned stack buffers; future ports should look for ATTRIBUTE_ALIGN(32), DCFlushRange, DCInvalidateRange, and DCFlushRangeNoSync patterns.
naming_conventions: Internal Dolphin SDK symbols use double-underscore prefixes, e.g. __ARChecksize, __ARWriteDMA, __AXAuxInit, __AXGetCurrentProfile, and __AXPushCallbackStack.
AX source/header filenames follow SDK module casing: AXAlloc.c/.h, AXAux.c/.h, AXProf.c/.h, AXVPB.h.
AX public APIs use AX-prefixed names such as AXAcquireVoice, AXFreeVoice, AXSetVoicePriority, AXRegisterAuxACallback, AXRegisterAuxBCallback, AXInitProfile, and AXGetProfile.
AX parameter-block structs use AXPB/AXVPB/AXPROFILE naming, with nested structs such as AXPBMIX, AXPBADDR, AXPBADPCM, and AXPBSRC.
DSP register macros in ar.h use descriptive DSP_* names and index values for __DSPRegs access.
Header guards use module-style names such as _DOLPHIN_AX_H_, DOLPHIN_AX_AXALLOC_H, DOLPHIN_AX_AXAUX_H, and DOLPHIN_AX_AXPROF_H.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed assembly only after adding corresponding C files and marking them as Matching in configure.py/obj_files.mk.
Used matching-sensitive casts such as pointer-to-u32 conversions and void* casts in AX stack pop helpers and AR aligned stack-buffer setup.
Preserved low-level bitmask patterns for DSP/ARAM register writes, including split high/low 16-bit address and length fields.
Used stack arrays padded to 63 bytes and manually aligned to 0x20 boundaries in __ARChecksize, mirroring assembly-visible alignment behavior.
Maintained explicit modulo-3 ring-buffer position updates for AX aux DSP/CPU buffer rotation.
For ARAM probing, wrote sentinel values 0xDEADBEEF and 0xBAD0BAD0, used DMA writes/reads at candidate mirror offsets, then updated __AR_Size and the uncached physical 0xD0 location.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that build on src/dolphin/ax.h struct layouts for AXVPB, AXCL, AXOut, or DSPCode matching.
Check whether AX_AUX_DATA field offset comments in ax.h were later corrected or clarified, since all three fields are shown with 0x00 in this PR excerpt.
Search for later fixes touching __AXGetAuxBInput, because this PR's diff shows it checks __AXCallbackAuxA while returning an Aux B buffer.
Search for subsequent symbol-size adjustments near __AXStackHead, __AXStackTail, __AXCallbackStack, and __AXAuxCpuReadWritePosition.
Compare later ARAM-related PRs for changes to __ARChecksize, OSPhysicalToUncached, or DSP register macros.
